added_paragraphs: We collect information in a few different ways
1. When you give it to us or give us permission to obtain it
2. We also get technical information when you use Pinterest
Additional Info for EEA, Swiss and UK Data Subjects: Legal bases we rely on where we use your information
llm_summary: Pinterest's updated privacy policy now includes additional details on how they collect information, specifying that they gather data both when users provide it and through technical means during usage. There is also new information for users in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK regarding the legal bases for data usage. No paragraphs were modified or removed in this update.
